name: Planar²
description: Multi-axis vector controller and gesture recorder. Precision joystick drives four quadrant VCAs (A-D) and two axis outputs (X/Y), records ~4 minutes of joystick motion, generates gates, and reshapes CV inputs in cartesian/polar/scan modes.

controls.name: Joystick
controls.description: Spring-loaded precision joystick controls quadrant levels A-D and axis outputs X/Y.
controls.detail: Four corner LEDs show quadrant levels · centred = all quads equal

controls.name: XY Button
controls.description: Three-state toggle controlling X/Y behaviour. Quick-press cycles lit/off; press-hold toggles between lit and flashing.
controls.detail: LIT: joystick+recording+CV · FLASHING: joystick only (ignores rec/CV) · UNLIT: CV IN only, joystick centred virtually

controls.name: ABCD Button
controls.description: Same three-state toggle but for outputs A, B, C, D and MIX.
controls.detail: LIT: joystick+recording+CV · FLASHING: joystick only · UNLIT: CV IN only

controls.name: MODE Button
controls.description: Cycles how CV 1 and CV 2 affect outputs: Cartesian, Polar, or Scan.
controls.detail: Cartesian: CV1→X CV2→Y · Polar: CV1=rotation CV2=radius · Scan: CV1=playback point CV2=linearity

controls.name: LOOP Button
controls.description: Three states set how a recording plays back.
controls.detail: UNLIT: one-shot · LIT: continuous loop · FLASHING: re-arm + wait for trigger

controls.name: MANUAL GATE Button
controls.description: Sends a high gate to GATE OUT as long as held. Recorded alongside joystick motion.
controls.detail: Push and hold · plays back with recording

controls.name: PLAY Button
controls.description: Starts/stops playback of recorded joystick motion. Four visual states reflect availability, arming, and playback.
controls.detail: Press+hold >1s erases recording · flashing when waiting for trigger

controls.name: RECORD Button
controls.description: Records joystick motion (incl. manual gate presses). Supports unsynced, synced, and punch-in modes.
controls.detail: ~4 min maximum recording · press during playback for punch-in overdub

controls.name: SENSE Switch
controls.description: When up, any joystick motion drives GATE OUT high automatically.
controls.detail: Up: auto-gate on motion · down: manual-gate only

controls.name: X Polarity Switch
controls.description: Switches X OUT between unipolar and bipolar.

controls.name: Y Polarity Switch
controls.description: Switches Y OUT between unipolar and bipolar.

controls.name: CV 1 Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts incoming CV at CV 1 before it reaches outputs.
controls.detail: CCW: max inverse · noon: zero · CW: full scale

controls.name: CV 2 Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts incoming CV at CV 2.
controls.detail: CCW: max inverse · noon: zero · CW: full scale

inputs.name: A IN
inputs.description: Audio/CV input routed through internal VCA to A OUT and summed into MIX. Normalized from MIX chain

inputs.name: B IN
inputs.description: Input through internal VCA B. Normalized from A IN when unpatched

inputs.name: C IN
inputs.description: Input through internal VCA C. Normalized from B IN when unpatched

inputs.name: D IN
inputs.description: Input through internal VCA D. Normalized from C IN when unpatched

inputs.name: CV 1
inputs.description: CV input that modulates outputs per MODE setting (Cartesian X / Polar rotation / Scan position)

inputs.name: CV 2
inputs.description: CV input that modulates outputs per MODE (Cartesian Y / Polar radius / Scan linearity)

inputs.name: TRIGGER (I>/●)
inputs.description: Sync input for recording and playback. Armed RECORD starts when trigger arrives; LOOP/play interactions depend on button state

outputs.name: A OUT
outputs.description: VCA A output controlled by joystick quadrant A position (top-left). Acts as 0-10V CV when A IN is unpatched

outputs.name: B OUT
outputs.description: VCA B output controlled by joystick quadrant B (top-right). 0-10V CV when B IN unpatched

outputs.name: C OUT
outputs.description: VCA C output controlled by joystick quadrant C (bottom-right)

outputs.name: D OUT
outputs.description: VCA D output controlled by joystick quadrant D (bottom-left)

outputs.name: MIX
outputs.description: Summed output of all four quadrant VCAs. Useful as crossfader output

outputs.name: X OUT
outputs.description: X-axis CV, polarity set by X polarity switch. Affected by joystick/recording/CV 1 per XY button state

outputs.name: Y OUT
outputs.description: Y-axis CV, polarity set by Y polarity switch

outputs.name: GATE OUT
outputs.description: Gate output from MANUAL GATE button, from joystick motion (SENSE up), or recorded gate presses

behaviors.name: Four-Input Quad Crossfader
behaviors.description: Patch four audio sources into A-D, take MIX output. Joystick position crossfades smoothly between them in vector space. Input normalization lets you use 1-4 sources interchangeably — unpatched inputs inherit from the one above.

behaviors.name: Quad Panner
behaviors.trigger: mono into A IN · individual A-D outputs to four speakers
behaviors.description: Route a mono signal through A IN (normalized to all four VCAs) and take A/B/C/D outputs to separate amplifiers. Joystick becomes a quadraphonic pan controller. Works with stereo by patching to A and C.

behaviors.name: Quad Processing Router
behaviors.trigger: A IN patched · A-D outs to 4 processors · return mix to stereo
behaviors.description: Patch source to A IN, take A-D outputs into four different FX (filter, wavefolder, delay, reverb), return to a mixer. Joystick crossfades between processor paths — dynamic multi-effect routing controlled by a single stick.

behaviors.name: CV Gesture Recorder
behaviors.description: Records joystick motion and manual-gate presses into a buffer. Plays back as 1-shot complex function generator or looped LFO. Punch-in recording over existing motion enables evolving gesture edits.

behaviors.name: Trigger-Synced Recording
behaviors.description: With the trigger jack patched, RECORD arms but waits for an incoming pulse before starting; another pulse can stop it. Send clock divisions to capture gestures that conform to bar lengths.

behaviors.name: Cartesian CV Mode
behaviors.description: CV 1 maps to X axis, CV 2 maps to Y axis. External LFOs can 'drive the joystick' programmatically — two perpendicular triangle LFOs at different rates trace Lissajous patterns across the four outputs.

behaviors.name: Polar CV Mode
behaviors.description: CV 1 controls rotation angle, CV 2 controls radius from centre. A sawtooth on CV 1 produces 360° spinning motion through all four outputs; combining with an LFO on CV 2 yields spiral or orbit gestures. CV 2 defaults to 0V — patch it or the effect won't be audible.

behaviors.name: Scan CV Mode
behaviors.trigger: MODE button → both LEDs · recording present
behaviors.description: CV 1 scrubs through a recorded gesture as a time axis; CV 2 sets the linearity (curve) of that scrub. Effectively lets you play the recording non-linearly — freeze, rewind, or stretch gestures with CV.

behaviors.name: SENSE Auto-Gate
behaviors.description: Any motion at the joystick drives GATE OUT high. Use to trigger envelopes only while the stick moves — natural articulation for vector performance.

behaviors.name: XY/ABCD Three-State Isolation
behaviors.description: UNLIT state disables joystick and recording for that output group, letting CV inputs take exclusive control. FLASHING isolates the live joystick and ignores recordings and CV — handy for doubling a recorded gesture with new live motion.

behaviors.name: Ramped Loop Boot Toggle
behaviors.description: Boot-time option (firmware 1.3+): enables a few-sample crossfade at loop boundaries so recordings that don't end where they start don't click. GATE+PLAY flash when enabled; PLAY+REC flash when disabled.

patchIdeas.name: Vector-controlled 4-voice crossfader
patchIdeas.patch: Four VCOs (distinct timbres) into A-D IN · MIX output to filter · joystick crossfades in 2D between the four voices · record a slow orbital gesture and loop for autonomous morphing
patchIdeas.diagram:
Planar 2:
* ABCD=lit · LOOP=lit

- VCO 1 (Out) -> Planar 2 (A IN)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> Planar 2 (B IN)
- VCO 3 (Out) -> Planar 2 (C IN)
- VCO 4 (Out) -> Planar 2 (D IN)
- Planar 2 (MIX) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In) // joystick crossfades 4 timbres

patchIdeas.name: Two-axis filter + wavefolder control
patchIdeas.patch: Nothing patched to A-D IN (so outputs are 0-10V CV) · X OUT to filter cutoff · Y OUT to wavefolder amount · bipolar switch on Y for positive/negative fold · play the filter and fold independently with one stick
patchIdeas.diagram:
Planar 2:
* X=UNI · Y=+/-

- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> Wavefolder (In)
- Planar 2 (X OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Planar 2 (Y OUT) >> Wavefolder (Fold)
- Wavefolder (Out) -> VCA (In) // 2-axis tone control

patchIdeas.name: Looped gesture as complex LFO
patchIdeas.patch: SENSE up so motion triggers gates · draw circles, figure-8s, or jagged shapes with the joystick while recording · enable LOOP · MIX and X/Y outputs now emit a custom LFO shape far more complex than a sine · gate follows the motion
patchIdeas.diagram:
Planar 2:
* SENSE=up · LOOP=lit · recording active

- Planar 2 (X OUT) >> VCO (FM)
- Planar 2 (Y OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Planar 2 (GATE OUT) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV) // custom gesture LFO

patchIdeas.name: Polar spin on stereo image
patchIdeas.patch: MODE = Polar · slow saw LFO into CV 1 · steady voltage (or slow LFO) into CV 2 · patch A to left-front, B to right-front, C to right-rear, D to left-rear amps · signal rotates 360° continuously in quadraphonic space
patchIdeas.diagram:
Planar 2:
* MODE=Polar · ABCD=unlit (CV only)

- Source (Out) -> Planar 2 (A IN)
- Saw LFO (Out) >> Planar 2 (CV 1)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Planar 2 (CV 2)
- Planar 2 (A OUT) -> Amp L-Front (In)
- Planar 2 (B OUT) -> Amp R-Front (In)
- Planar 2 (C OUT) -> Amp R-Rear (In)
- Planar 2 (D OUT) -> Amp L-Rear (In) // quad orbit

patchIdeas.name: Synced gesture playback to clock bar
patchIdeas.patch: Patch clock divided by 4 bars into TRIGGER · RECORD armed starts on clock pulse, stops on next · LOOP=lit so gesture loops bar-aligned · joystick motion now conforms to the bar grid · evolving bar-long filter/pitch automation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Planar 2:
* LOOP=lit · TRIGGER patched

- Clock /4 (Out) c> Planar 2 (TRIGGER)
- Planar 2 (X OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Planar 2 (Y OUT) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Planar 2 (GATE OUT) g> Envelope (Trig) // bar-locked gesture

patchIdeas.name: Scan-mode gesture timeline
patchIdeas.patch: Record a 30-second joystick gesture · MODE = Scan · CV 1 from another sequencer/LFO scrubs back and forth through the gesture · CV 2 from different LFO sets how linearly that scan interpolates · non-linear playback of recorded motion
patchIdeas.diagram:
Planar 2:
* MODE=Scan · recording present · LOOP=off

- Sequencer (CV) >> Planar 2 (CV 1)
- LFO (Out) >> Planar 2 (CV 2)
- Planar 2 (X OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Planar 2 (Y OUT) >> Wavefolder (Fold) // scrubbable gesture

patchIdeas.name: Quad FX send/return router
patchIdeas.patch: Dry voice into A IN · A OUT into reverb · B OUT into delay · C OUT into bitcrusher · D OUT into distortion · sum returns into stereo mixer · joystick position selects which effect dominates · joystick hold points create texture presets
patchIdeas.diagram:
Planar 2:
* A IN patched · ABCD=lit

- Voice (Out) -> Planar 2 (A IN)
- Planar 2 (A OUT) -> Reverb (In)
- Planar 2 (B OUT) -> Delay (In)
- Planar 2 (C OUT) -> Bitcrusher (In)
- Planar 2 (D OUT) -> Distortion (In)
- Reverb (Out) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Delay (Out) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Bitcrusher (Out) -> Mixer (In 3)
- Distortion (Out) -> Mixer (In 4) // joystick FX router
